description: Style Note Strikingly chic, this top from femella is a detail-oriented deconstruction of a wardrobe essential. Offering a flowy silhouette, you can pair this one with a pencil skirt or a pair of jeans for a casual to semi formal look. We think strappy sandals for your feet complements the look best. Product Details Blue top with a V neckline, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, a single box pleat at the back, an inverted V pleat, diagonal pleats from the shoulder, a decorative gold zipper on the left chest and a curved hemline Material and Care Blended fabric Cold wash with like colours Do not bleach or wring Use warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
